name: flutter
description: Flutter Stock Exchange Party Game - multi-screen board game with .NET server, React handset, and Kotlin TV app
prompt: You are helping build Flutter, a digital adaptation of the 1966 J.W. Spear & Sons board game. Architecture: .NET 8 SignalR server (server/), React/Vite/Tailwind handset app (handset/), Kotlin/Jetpack Compose for TV display (tv/). All communicate via SignalR over LAN. The developer is experienced with C#/.NET and React but new to Kotlin/Jetpack Compose. Keep code minimal and clean. Match existing patterns in each sub-project.
